name: show-me-file-data
title: Show Me Data
description: Show comprehensive file metadata for files selected in Finder
author: dustintchambers

preferences.name: showBasicInfo
preferences.title: Sidebar Sections
preferences.label: Basic Info
preferences.description: Show file name, size, type, and path in the sidebar

preferences.name: showDates
preferences.label: Dates
preferences.description: Show created, modified, and accessed dates in the sidebar

preferences.name: showPermissions
preferences.label: Permissions
preferences.description: Show file permissions, UID, GID, inode in the sidebar

preferences.name: showSpotlight
preferences.label: Spotlight Metadata
preferences.description: Show macOS Spotlight metadata (content type, kind, etc.) in the sidebar

preferences.name: showImageDetails
preferences.label: Image Details
preferences.description: Show dimensions, color space, DPI for image files in the sidebar

preferences.name: showAudioVideo
preferences.label: Audio/Video Details
preferences.description: Show duration, bit rate, channels for media files in the sidebar

preferences.name: showExif
preferences.label: EXIF Data
preferences.description: Show camera and lens EXIF data for photos in the sidebar

commands.name: show-file-info
commands.title: Show File Info
commands.subtitle: Show Me Data
commands.description: Show metadata for files selected in Finder
